name: Display Scoreboard
desc: Sets which scoreboard objective is displayed in a position (sidebar, list, below name).

fields.name: objectiveName
fields.desc: Objective to display (empty string to clear)

implementation.overview: S3D sets the displayed scoreboard. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S3DPacketDisplayScoreboard)
modules.purpose: Server sends S3DPacketDisplayScoreboard to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
